How It Works
Three steps to your first commission
You're already influencing purchases. DELT just makes sure you get paid for it.
01
Open your store
Get your own retail store inside DELT. Add affiliated product links, coupon codes, or brands you already recommend — all in one place. Live in minutes.
Free forever
02
Share your code
Every product gets a unique coupon code automatically — like AJINKYA10. Share it in your Reels, Stories, or bio. Your audience gets a discount. You earn commission.
Auto-generated
03
Earn every sale. Forever.
Every time someone uses your code — for weeks or months after you posted — you earn. One Reel keeps paying long after it's gone. Commissions stack automatically.
Passive income

What You Get
Everything you need
to turn content
into income.
I.
Your storefront. Your brand.
A clean, shareable store with your photo and curated picks. Paste any product link — we fetch the image, name, and price automatically. Live in minutes.
II.
Earn from content you already post
Every recommendation gets a unique coupon code. Your audience buys. You earn 2–15% commission per sale — tracked, accumulated, paid to your UPI automatically.
III.
Real numbers. Not estimates.
See exactly which products are getting clicks, which codes are converting, and how much you've earned — today, this week, this month. Your data. Yours alone.
IV.
Payment protection — coming next
For sponsored deals: brands pay into escrow before you create anything. A public Brand Trust Score shows who pays on time. Know before you say yes.
The Differentiator
The Brand
Trust Score.
A public reputation layer for every brand — built from real payment history, creator reviews, and payout speed. Coming to DELT soon. Know before you agree to anything.
✓
Payment history — public for every brand
Average days to pay, on-time rate, total collabs done
✓
Creator reviews, verified
Real feedback from creators who have worked with this brand — not marketing copy
✓
The data moat grows with every transaction
500 real collabs = a reputation database no new entrant can replicate overnight
